title: hymenophyllum johorense
intro: Hymenophyllum johorense, also known as Johore filmy fern, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. It is a type of epiphytic fern that is native to Malaysia and is known for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been found to have antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, providing health benefits including wound healing, anti-aging, and immune system support. In traditional medicine, Hymenophyllum johorense is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used in herbal preparations such as capsules, tablets, or topical creams.
